Meeting.title: Meeting
Meeting.description: Represents a meeting with its name, minutes, and AI-generated description.

name.description: The name or title of the meeting.

minutes.description: The full text of the meeting minutes.

aiDescription.description: AI-generated summary or description of the meeting.

updatedAt.description: When the meeting was last updated.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this meeting.

authorName.description: The display name of the user who created/added the meeting.

authorEmail.description: The email of the user who created/added the meeting.
